mapper.insert: insert into work_order_ext(order_no, source, solution, is_requester_confirmed, requester_confirmed_at, is_merged, is_split, merged_to_order_no, original_order_no, close_reason, reject_reason, auto_close_at, last_reminder_at, reminder_count, created_at, updated_at) values (#{orderNo}, #{source}, #{solution}, #{isRequesterConfirmed}, #{requesterConfirmedAt}, #{isMerged}, #{isSplit}, #{mergedToOrderNo}, #{originalOrderNo}, #{closeReason}, #{rejectReason}, #{autoCloseAt}, #{lastReminderAt}, #{reminderCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update work_order_ext set source = #{source}, solution = #{solution}, is_requester_confirmed = #{isRequesterConfirmed}, requester_confirmed_at = #{requesterConfirmedAt}, is_merged = #{isMerged}, is_split = #{isSplit}, merged_to_order_no = #{mergedToOrderNo}, original_order_no = #{originalOrderNo}, close_reason = #{closeReason}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, auto_close_at = #{autoCloseAt}, last_reminder_at = #{lastReminderAt}, reminder_count = #{reminderCount}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where order_no = #{orderNo}
update work_order_ext set solution = #{solution}, updated_at = NOW() where order_no = #{orderNo}
update work_order_ext set reminder_count = reminder_count + 1, last_reminder_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() where order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.select: select id, order_no, source, solution, is_requester_confirmed, requester_confirmed_at, is_merged, is_split, merged_to_order_no, original_order_no, close_reason, reject_reason, auto_close_at, last_reminder_at, reminder_count, created_at, updated_at from work_order_ext where order_no = #{orderNo}

select id, order_no, source, solution, is_requester_confirmed, requester_confirmed_at, is_merged, is_split, merged_to_order_no, original_order_no, close_reason, reject_reason, auto_close_at, last_reminder_at, reminder_count, created_at, updated_at from work_order_ext order by created_at desc
